# Issue Title

Add a compact screenshots gallery to the main README

## Description

The main README currently references screenshots for each existing skill. This can be improved with a more compact gallery layout that makes the repository easier to scan for first-time visitors.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The README includes a clean screenshots section for all current skills.
- [ ] Light and dark screenshots are referenced with correct relative paths.
- [ ] The section remains readable on GitHub.
- [ ] No fake screenshots or missing files are referenced.

## Suggested Labels

`documentation`, `good first issue`
